caption.full:
Ella Beatty in final talks for The Bell Jar adaptation

Ella Beatty is reportedly in final negotiations to join the cast of Sarah Polley's adaptation of Sylvia Plath's The Bell Jar. Billie Eilish is set to portray the protagonist in her film acting debut, while Carey Mulligan will play the mother. The film is directed by Oscar winner Sarah Polley from her own screenplay.

Send this to a friend who loves Sylvia Plath!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #TheBellJar #EllaBeatty #BillieEilish
caption.firstComment: So thrilled to see Billie stepping into Esther Greenwood — who here is team Ella Beatty for the supporting role?
